name: public_transportation_port_security_cedar_ind_col
premise: A Public Transportation response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving public transportation port security cedar ind col. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the next shift change. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as individual vs collective under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Amina Navarro
agents.identity: I am Amina Navarro, accountable for a defensible call in Public Transportation when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays collective for individual.

agents.name: Mei Okoye
agents.identity: I am Mei Okoye, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Public Transportation.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so collective isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of individual.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect collective.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to collective to secure individual under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the next shift change. Evidence is partial. Amina Navarro must decide under individual vs collective. What does Amina Navarro do?
